strategy_description: Initial tilt: BS theo + vega-scaled extract ret/z shift; hydrogel MM; directional extract taker on strong z+ret (removed in later iterations after large losses).
Anchor VEV quotes to wall_mid + tilt; no extract overlay; hydrogel MM; grid arm vs v2 (inside-quote).
Parameter sweep: one-tick-inside bid/ask + integer vega-scaled tilt; no hydrogel (all strikes trade). TILT_AMP=4.5, VEV_SIZE=20.
Parameter sweep: stronger z weight, larger VEV_SIZE=26, TILT_AMP=4.0.
Combine v2-style inside-quote tilt with v1 hydrogel MM; TILT_AMP=4.0, VEV_SIZE=19 — best total in this sweep.
Strike-filtered (5200/5300/5400/5500) tilt using highest vega-per-spread subset; hydrogel disabled via size=0. Too selective with inside quotes -> no fills.
Strike-filtered robustness arm with lower amplitude/size; hydrogel disabled. Also produced no fills.
All-strike tilt with stronger z-weight and adaptive size by spread bucket; hydrogel disabled.
Strike-filtered tilt quoting at best levels instead of inside to force participation; hydrogel disabled. Participated but weak PnL.
v4 parent plus mild inventory-skew offset in quote shift (sh -= round(pos/120)); near-tie with v4 but slightly worse.
v4 + delta-weighted tilt/qty: scale by (vega/VEGA_REF) * (DELTA_W + (1-DELTA_W)*|delta|) with smile IV. Ties v4 total (16,039) in this run.
v4 without hydrogel, slightly larger VEV and W_Z; benchmark-style surface-only leg. Worse than v4 at 8,395.
v4 + spread-aware tilt multiplier (down-weight when ba-bb wide). New best total 16,148 vs previous 16,039.
v12 + W_Z 0.52->0.56 to lean on extract z-signal. Total 16,125 (below v12).
v12 with stronger spread dampening (0.86/0.72 vs 0.88/0.75). New best total 16,170.
v12 + smaller VEV/hydrogel clip (17/10) to reduce day-2 drag. Total 16,148 (ties v12).
v14 with stronger two-tier spread dampening (0.84/0.70). Total 16,181 (above v14 16,170).
v14 + third spread tier: spread>8 -> mult 0.64. New best total 16,195.
v14 with TILT_AMP 3.88 (vs 4.0) to reduce noise. Total 16,181 (ties v16).
v17 with heavier spread dampening (0.84/0.68/0.56). Improved to 16,225.
v17 with heavier spread dampening (0.85/0.66/0.54) and VEV_SIZE 18. New best total 16,246.
v17 with lower TILT_AMP 3.9 and higher W_Z 0.56. Matches v17 at 16,195.
v20 with tighter spread dampening (0.84/0.64/0.52). New best 16,260.
v20 with third bucket starting at spread>7 (CUT3=7). Total 16,246 (ties v20).
v20 with VEV_SIZE=17. Total 16,246 (ties v20).
Re-run v22 with saved log/fill summary artifacts under --match-trades worse (same params, reproducibility run).
backtest_command: PYTHONPATH="imc-prosperity-4-backtester:imc-prosperity-4-backtester/prosperity4bt" python3 -m prosperity4bt manual_traders/R3_VEV/r3v_velvet_beta_hedge_02/trader_v22.py 3 --data Prosperity4Data --match-trades worse --no-progress --no-vis --no-out 2>&1 | tee backtests/r3v_v22_worse.log

strategy_description: Re-run v24 with saved log/fill summary artifacts under --match-trades worse.
backtest_command: PYTHONPATH="imc-prosperity-4-backtester:imc-prosperity-4-backtester/prosperity4bt" python3 -m prosperity4bt manual_traders/R3_VEV/r3v_velvet_beta_hedge_02/trader_v24.py 3 --data Prosperity4Data --match-trades worse --no-progress --no-vis --no-out 2>&1 | tee backtests/r3v_v24_worse.log

strategy_description: Family10 WLS variant: dynamic quadratic smile fit with inverse-spread weights each tick; integrated minimally into v22 architecture. Underperformed baseline.
backtest_command: PYTHONPATH="imc-prosperity-4-backtester:imc-prosperity-4-backtester/prosperity4bt" python3 -m prosperity4bt manual_traders/R3_VEV/r3v_velvet_beta_hedge_02/trader_v25.py 3 --data Prosperity4Data --match-trades worse --no-progress --no-vis --no-out 2>&1 | tee backtests/r3v_v25_worse.log

strategy_description: Family10 WLS variant: dynamic quadratic smile fit with spread+sqrt(vega) hybrid weights each tick; better than v25 but still below v22.
backtest_command: PYTHONPATH="imc-prosperity-4-backtester:imc-prosperity-4-backtester/prosperity4bt" python3 -m prosperity4bt manual_traders/R3_VEV/r3v_velvet_beta_hedge_02/trader_v26.py 3 --data Prosperity4Data --match-trades worse --no-progress --no-vis --no-out 2>&1 | tee backtests/r3v_v26_worse.log

strategy_description: v22 plus strike-specific tilt response from estimated beta_0 and spread-shock sign (analysis_v8).
backtest_command: PYTHONPATH="imc-prosperity-4-backtester:imc-prosperity-4-backtester/prosperity4bt" python3 -m prosperity4bt manual_traders/R3_VEV/r3v_velvet_beta_hedge_02/trader_v27.py 3 --data Prosperity4Data --match-trades worse --no-progress --no-vis --no-out 2>&1 | tee backtests/r3v_v27_worse.log

strategy_description: v27 plus mild lag term from beta_l1 in tilt shift; same spread dampening as v22.
backtest_command: PYTHONPATH="imc-prosperity-4-backtester:imc-prosperity-4-backtester/prosperity4bt" python3 -m prosperity4bt manual_traders/R3_VEV/r3v_velvet_beta_hedge_02/trader_v28.py 3 --data Prosperity4Data --match-trades worse --no-progress --no-vis --no-out 2>&1 | tee backtests/r3v_v28_worse.log

strategy_description: v22 border probe: TILT_AMP=4.05, W_Z=0.54, looser spread mults 0.85/0.65/0.53. Total 16,232 (below v22).
backtest_command: PYTHONPATH="imc-prosperity-4-backtester:imc-prosperity-4-backtester/prosperity4bt" python3 -m prosperity4bt manual_traders/R3_VEV/r3v_velvet_beta_hedge_02/trader_v29.py 3 --data Prosperity4Data --match-trades worse --no-progress --no-vis --no-out 2>&1 | tee backtests/r3v_v29_worse.log

strategy_description: v22 with lower TILT_AMP=3.9, higher W_Z=0.57 (more z vs ret). Total 16,248: best in this pair but still below v22 16,260.
backtest_command: PYTHONPATH="imc-prosperity-4-backtester:imc-prosperity-4-backtester/prosperity4bt" python3 -m prosperity4bt manual_traders/R3_VEV/r3v_velvet_beta_hedge_02/trader_v30.py 3 --data Prosperity4Data --match-trades worse --no-progress --no-vis --no-out 2>&1 | tee backtests/r3v_v30_worse.log

strategy_description: v22 + near-ATM tight gate: when VEV_5200 and VEV_5300 synthetic spreads are both <=2, multiply tilt shift by 1.1 (round3work tight 5200/5300 narrative; analysis_v9). PnL 16,254 vs v22 16,260 on explicit R3 days 0-1-2 (see backtest note).
trades_or_fills_summary: manual_traders/R3_VEV/r3v_velvet_beta_hedge_02/fills_summary_v22_v31_v32_d0d1d2.json (trader_v31); note: after merge, `3` alone includes R3 day 3 tape—use 3-0 3-1 3-2 to match days 0–2 benchmark.

strategy_description: v31 plus v9-style inventory skew (sh -= round(pos/120)). Ties v31 at 16,254 on d0-2 (no extra edge vs v31).
v22 + extract shock guard: 0.9x tilt when |ret1|>1.0 (analysis_v10: V4000 |dv| tracks extract shock magnitude; spread s4000 flat in shock state). d0-2 worse total 16,273, new best vs v22 16,260.
v22 + 2-tick return term: W_RET2=0.22 on clip(ret2/TILT_RET_SCALE) in tilt blend. d0-2 total 16,213 (worse than v22).

v33 + STRATEGY.txt joint BBO gate: s5200<=2 and s5300<=2 (ask1-bid1) => TIGHT_VEV_TILT_MULT 1.06 on VEV tilt; one-tick-inside VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT (U_SIZE 18) when tight; v33 shock guard. Hydrogel MM as v4/v33. New best total 18,232 d0-2 (worse=all fill stats here).
